task_completion.description: Fetch the 1STP structure and its 2mFo-DFc electron density map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL object menu (usually on the right) should list '1stp' and a corresponding map object (e.g., '2fofc' or similar map identifier).

task_completion.description: Isolate the biotin ligand (BTN) and display it as sticks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the PyMOL 3D viewer, the BTN ligand should be clearly visible in a stick representation. The rest of the protein may be hidden or shown differently, but the ligand must be isolated/focused.

task_completion.description: Create a distinctly colored isomesh from the density map, carved exclusively around the BTN ligand.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A wireframe/mesh structure should be visible in the 3D viewer, tightly surrounding ONLY the BTN ligand (indicating it was carved with a buffer). The mesh should have a distinct color applied to it.

task_completion.description: Save the PyMOL session state to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL command line, terminal, or file manager should show a command or file indicating the session was saved to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/sessions/biotin_density.pse'.

task_completion.description: Render and save a high-resolution PNG figure to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL command line, terminal, or file manager should show a command or file indicating an image was saved to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/biotin_mesh.png'.

task_completion.description: Write a text report containing the PDB ID, ligand name, sigma level, and carving buffer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window should show the creation or content of '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/density_report.txt' containing '1STP', 'BTN', a sigma value (1.0 or 1.5), and a buffer distance (1.5 to 2.0).

integrity.description: The agent actually used PyMOL to generate the mesh and images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI or PyMOL command-line interface being actively used to manipulate the structure, rather than just mocking the output files via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the report file with the requested parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen typing out the report in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or using echo/cat commands in the terminal, rather than copying a pre-existing file.

integrity.description: The final saved image corresponds to the work done in the PyMOL viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewer state in PyMOL (showing the carved mesh and stick ligand) should match the expected output of the saved PNG figure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: PDB ID is 1STP. Ligand ID is BTN. Expected file paths: Session at '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/sessions/biotin_density.pse', Figure at '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/biotin_mesh.png', Report at '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/density_report.txt'.
